codeReview.summary: The feature wrote and verified /tmp/mcp-droid-mismatch/step3.txt correctly, but it records unrelated repository commit 598d18e as the feature commit even though the work only touched /tmp and produced no repo diff.

issues.description: The handoff claims commitId 598d18e belongs to this feature, but git show 598d18e only adds the file-writer skill and has no changes related to /tmp/mcp-droid-mismatch/step3.txt. This makes the completion record incorrect for the feature's stated scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission references a file-writer skill under the repo-local .factory tree, but the actual skill used for this milestone was committed in the repo and not present under ~/.factory/skills, while transcript reads /Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/services.yaml despite the repo currently lacking that file. The mission/shared-state setup for skill and services locations appears inconsistent.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 2a3239ea-4c1c-45b9-9746-4a37a87df910 shows Read on /Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/services.yaml and Skill file-writer; current repo state has no /Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/services.yaml, and the committed skill lives at commit 598d18e path .factory/skills/file-writer/SKILL.md while /Users/serkan/.factory/skills/file-writer/SKILL.md does not exist.

summary: Fail: the file write itself succeeded, but the feature handoff attributes the work to unrelated commit 598d18e, so the recorded completion evidence is not trustworthy. One blocking issue noted; one shared-state inconsistency around skill/services paths should be triaged.
